title: Media Showcase — Video and Audio
description: Add media elements to your portfolio. Include a video element with the controls attribute and a source element inside it. Add an audio element with controls and a source. Both should have fallback text for browsers that do not support media playback.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 9: Video and Audio # Add video and audio elements with controls, source, and fallback text. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

About Me | Projects | Contact

About Me

I am a developer who is passionate about building things. I am constantly learning and love problem-solving.

SkillLevelYears
HTMLBeginner1
CSSBeginner1
PythonIntermediate2

My Projects

Contact

© 2026 Your Name

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '<video' in html.lower() and '</video>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <video> element'
assert '<audio' in html.lower() and '</audio>' in html.lower(), 'Must include an <audio> element'
assert '<source' in html.lower(), 'Must include <source> elements inside video and audio'
assert html.lower().count('<source') >= 2, f'Need at least 2 <source> elements (one for video, one for audio), found {html.lower().count("<source")}'
assert 'controls' in html.lower(), 'Video and audio elements must have the controls attribute'
acceptance_criteria: A video element with the controls attribute
A source element inside the video with src and type
An audio element with the controls attribute
A source element inside the audio with src and type
Fallback text inside both video and audio elements
hints: Video: <video controls><source src="demo.mp4" type="video/mp4">Your browser does not support video.</video>
Audio: <audio controls><source src="music.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>
The controls attribute has no value — just add the word 'controls'
